commit_subject: CURLOPT_HEADEROPT: default to separate
curl: avoid local drive traversal when saving file (Windows)
file: output the correct buffer to the user
tftp: reject file name lengths that don't fit
FTP: zero terminate the entry path even on bad input
ntlm: avoid integer overflow for malloc size
wildcardmatch: fix heap buffer overflow in setcharset
http2: fix incorrect trailer buffer size
http: prevent custom Authorization headers in redirects
file: on Windows, refuse paths that start with \\
tftp: Alloc maximum blksize, and use default unless OACK is received
url: make the updated credentials URL-encoded in the URL
tool_getparam: -i is not OK if -J is used
url: check sasl additional parameters for connection reuse.
cookies: make bad_domain() not consider a trailing dot fine
nss: return error if seemingly stuck in a cert loop
cookie: apply limits
content_encoding: return error on too many compression steps
netrc: address several netrc parser flaws
async-thread: avoid closing eventfd twice
content_encoding: drop support for zlib before 1.2.0.4
cookie: don't treat the leading slash as trailing
libssh2: fix sftp_statemachine busyloop when *block=true
[1.11.x] Fixed CVE-2018-7537 -- Fixed catastrophic backtracking in django.utils.text.Truncator.
[4.2.x] Refs CVE-2024-11168 -- Updated vendored _urlsplit() to properly validate IPv6 and IPvFuture addresses.
list-objects: pass full pathname to callbacks
Don't resend username to PAM; it already has it.
ignore PAM environment vars when UseLogin=yes
upstream: when receving a file in sink(), be careful to send at
upstream: Always return allocated strings from the kex filtering so
Fix CVE-2022-3786 in punycode decoder.
Fix type confusion in nc_match_single()
pk7_doit.c: Check return of BIO_set_md() calls
Fix heap overflow vulnerability in XAUTOCLAIM (CVE-2022-35951)
Whenever a generated column is used, assume that all columns are used.
Avoid infinite recursion in the ALTER TABLE code when a view contains an unused CTE that references, directly or indirectly, the view itself.

When processing constant integer values in ORDER BY clauses of window definitions (see check-in [7e4809eadfe99ebf]) be sure to fully disable the constant value to avoid an invalid pointer dereference if the expression is ever duplicated. This fixes a crash report from Yongheng and Rui.
Fix the zipfile extension so that INSERT works even if the pathname of the file being inserted is a NULL.  Bug discovered by the Yongheng and Rui fuzzer.
Fix a bug when getting a gzip header extra field with inflate().
